dct_description_sm: Latitudinal and longitudinal lines along margins; linear parallels indicated at sides.

Appears in Magini's edition of Ptolemy's Geographia, Venice, 1596; this copy from Cernotti's Italian translation: Geografia Cioè Descrittione Universale Della Terra, Venice: Giovanni Battista & Giorgio Galignani, 1597-1598.
